title: StatMuse Oracle MCP Server
description: AI-powered sports data extraction via StatMuse. Stealth browser → DOM distillation → Gemini schema enforcement → typed JSON. Supports NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL.

tools.name: query_statmuse
tools.description: Query StatMuse for highly specific sports statistics using natural language. Returns structured JSON with stats tables, summary answers, and player art URLs.

tools.name: compare_players
tools.description: Compare two players or teams by running parallel StatMuse queries.

tools.name: statmuse_cache_stats
tools.description: Returns cache diagnostics — entries, TTL, hit rate.
